# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next';

const edgeFunction = async ({ request, response }: { request: NextApiRequest; response: NextApiResponse }) => {
  const bufferedReader = new ReadableStream({
    pull(controller) {
      const chunk = request.headers.get('Content-Type') === 'application/json'
        ? JSON.stringify(request.json())
        : request.body;
      if (!chunk) return;
      controller.enqueue(chunk);
      controller.close();
    },
  });

  await response.stream(bufferedReader);

  const userData = new ReadableStream({
    async pull(controller) {
      const userHeaders = { ...request.headers };
      delete userHeaders['Content-Type'];
      for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(userHeaders)) {
        if (!value.includes('none')) {
          controller.enqueue(`${key}: ${value}\n`);
        }
      }
      await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
    },
  });

  await response.stream(userData);
};

export default edgeFunction;
